Press & Hold to verify you are human

We noticed unusual traffic from your network. Please complete the human verification challenge below to continue.

Why am I seeing this page?

Synthetic captcha-page placeholder prose. This block page exists for Phase 13 test fixtures only and does not represent any real anti-bot CDN content. The contents below are filler so the body length exceeds MIN_BODY_BYTES = 5000 and the block-detection ordering in lib.property_block_detector.detect_block fires on captcha_detected (cheap-first after status and length), NOT on body_too_short. That is the more realistic real-world scenario: a fully rendered CDN challenge page that is large enough to look "normal" by length but contains the captcha phrase signal.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Phasellus euismod lacus a magna porta, sed gravida sapien gravida. Vivamus venenatis purus eget elit dignissim, vitae blandit nibh tristique. Nam at libero ut nibh efficitur elementum at non purus. Aenean placerat, lacus et imperdiet tincidunt, leo sapien venenatis nulla, eget vehicula libero leo at sapien. Praesent feugiat lectus a justo iaculis, ac aliquam mi tincidunt. Maecenas nec orci eget orci volutpat egestas. Sed at lacus ac justo sodales hendrerit a sed velit.

Pellentesque habitant morbi tristique senectus et netus et malesuada fames ac turpis egestas. Integer eu pretium ante. Cras lobortis, mauris vitae consectetur consequat, nibh massa luctus ipsum, et dapibus ipsum eros eget risus. Donec nec lectus a est aliquam fermentum. Curabitur quis lacus ac magna posuere posuere a non sapien. Suspendisse potenti. Phasellus sit amet sapien at est venenatis dictum. Proin eu sapien at lacus consequat porta.

Etiam vitae lacinia urna. Mauris eget tortor sit amet sapien luctus elementum. Aliquam erat volutpat. Sed in nibh sit amet eros gravida mattis. Vivamus interdum, sapien id placerat porta, lacus risus dictum tortor, eget tincidunt magna eros nec leo. Suspendisse sed dignissim arcu, nec dictum tortor. Mauris pellentesque, ipsum vitae imperdiet tempus, justo sapien volutpat sapien, vitae blandit eros lacus eget ante. Donec a metus ut massa ultricies fringilla. In hac habitasse platea dictumst.

Synthetic challenge-explanation placeholder. The CAPTCHA_PHRASES list in lib.property_block_detector includes generic English phrases like "Press & Hold" and "human verification" and "unusual traffic" because those phrases are common across multiple anti-bot CDN providers. The phrases are not copyrighted and are present here purely as a synthetic detection target. No specific CDN's proprietary content is reproduced. The fixture exists only to exercise the cheap-first detection ordering locked in Plan 13-02.

Additional synthetic prose for byte-padding. The fixture deliberately has no embedded listing payload because a real anti-bot block page would not ship the underlying record; defense in depth means the captcha signal fires first regardless of payload presence. Detection order: status code check (always 200 for fixture-from-file), body length check (passes because this fixture is padded above 5000 bytes), captcha phrase check (FIRES on "press & hold"), and the missing-payload signal (would also fire but captcha fires first per the cheap-first ordering).

Synthetic block-page paragraph. Generic CDN-style messaging continues here to extend the fixture body. We noticed unusual traffic. Please complete the human verification challenge. Synthetic; not real CDN output; not real visitor guidance. The fixture exists for unit-testing the block-detection envelope path that emits shape-3 with error=captcha_detected.

One more padding paragraph. Synthetic; placeholder; fixture-only; not real. Phase 13 D-13-BLOCK-01 locks the four detection signals: HTTP status code, body too short, captcha phrase substring match, and missing structured-payload tag. This fixture exercises signal three. The other three signals have their own dedicated tests against synthetic strings in tests/test_property_block_detector.py; no separate file fixture is needed for those signals.
